name: Sylus
description:
“Seems like I’ve returned just in time to give you a break.” | In which Sylus and his beloved have started a family of their own.

Their family grows by the minute. With each passing hour away from her, he frets on what he may miss. From the inescapable power growing inside her, to the bundles of chaos incarnate that turns their chapel home upside down when they feel like it.

Bag heavy with the last of his spoils, he begins his journey home.

To the unassuming church, abandoned long ago by humans and overtaken by what had originally been the last dragon and his mate. Now, new life being formed, memories etched into the walls and crafted with cradling claws.

The nave turned to a makeshift living area, the yard fenced off with warnings. Lanterns and lights strung up inside and out, stained glass in the chapel casting maroon, rich orchid hues down into the grandness of their makeshift lair. Once abandoned, remade from the love and determination of bound souls.

you’re actually so real for this request because THEY DID DESERVE TO BE HAPPY TOGETHER !!
